survey_metadata.topic: Zero-shot fault diagnosis based on generative models
survey_metadata.target_journal: IEEE Transactions on Instrumentation and Measurement

references.title: Zero-shot compound fault diagnosis with semantic graph embedding and multi-stage fusion
references.key_contribution: Proposes semantic graph embedding for compound fault diagnosis with multi-stage feature fusion

references.title: A Hybrid Semantic-Based Embedded Zero-Shot Learning Method for Compound Fault Diagnosis of Bearings
references.key_contribution: Uses Symmetrized Dot Patterns (SDP) with semantic embedding module for compound fault diagnosis

references.title: Zero-shot fault diagnosis using soft semantic embedding of diffusion-encoded probability
references.key_contribution: Introduces soft semantic embedding with diffusion-encoded probability for zero-shot diagnosis

references.title: Simulation-data Driven Generalized Zero-Shot Learning for Multi-agent Bearing Compound Fault Diagnosis
references.key_contribution: Leverages simulation data to train generative models for compound fault diagnosis without real samples

references.title: A zero-shot across tasks fault diagnosis method of bearings combined simulation model with experimental data
references.key_contribution: Combines simulation models with limited experimental data for zero-shot diagnosis across working conditions

references.title: Digital Twin-Driven Zero-Shot Fault Diagnosis of Axial Piston Pumps Using Fluid-Borne Noise Signals
references.key_contribution: Calibrates high-fidelity digital twin using only healthy-state data with PINN as virtual sensor

references.title: Cross-domain zero-shot fault diagnosis method for high-voltage circuit breakers driven by multidomain spatial projection and dual embedded structure
references.key_contribution: Uses multidomain spatial projection with dual embedded structure for cross-domain zero-shot diagnosis

references.title: A Zero-Shot Framework for Compound Fault Diagnosis in Rotating Machinery Using Orthogonal High-order Semantics and Cross-hierarchical Discriminative Learning
references.key_contribution: Orthogonal constraint mechanism with multi-level optimization for compound fault diagnosis
references.relevance: Very High - Advanced compound fault method

references.title: Knowledge-data synergy enabling zero-shot composite fault diagnosis in sucker-rod pumping systems
references.key_contribution: Constructs unified semantic space by jointly embedding text-based descriptions and capsule-encoded features

references.title: Domain Knowledge-Driven Zero-Shot Learning for Induced Draft Fans Fault Diagnosis
references.key_contribution: Leverages domain-specific knowledge with CGAN to synthesize realistic fault data

references.title: Fault Diagnosis for Imbalanced Datasets Based on Deep Convolution Fuzzy System
references.key_contribution: Proposes Bidirectional Autoregressive VAE (BAVAE) with Deep Convolutional Interval Type-2 Fuzzy System

references.title: Fault detection of high-speed train wheelset bearings based on improved auxiliary classifier generative adversarial networks and VAE
references.key_contribution: Combines VAE with Improved Auxiliary Classifier GAN achieving 88.04% accuracy on XJTU dataset

references.title: Variational Autoencoder Based on Distributional Semantic Embedding and Cross-Modal Reconstruction for Generalized Zero-Shot Fault Diagnosis
references.key_contribution: Uses distributional semantic embedding in VAE latent space with cross-modal reconstruction

references.title: C-GAN-VAE: Causal Generative Adversarial Variational Autoencoder for few shot fine grained cross domain fault diagnosis for planetary gearbox
references.key_contribution: Integrates CGAN into Gaussian Mixture VAE for few-shot cross-domain diagnosis

references.title: Mixed-attention variational autoencoding generative adversarial networks for rolling bearing fault diagnosis
references.key_contribution: Proposes mixed-attention mechanism in VAE-GAN framework for imbalanced data

references.title: CWMS-GAN: A small-sample bearing fault diagnosis method based on continuous wavelet transform and multi-size kernel attention mechanism
references.key_contribution: Combines CWT with GAN and multi-size kernel attention for small-sample diagnosis

references.title: Application of an improved GAN with a filter mechanism in small-sample bearing fault diagnosis
references.key_contribution: Introduces filter mechanism to improve GAN quality for bearing fault diagnosis

references.title: A hybrid approach combining deep learning and signal processing for bearing fault diagnosis under imbalanced samples and multiple operating conditions
references.key_contribution: Combines GAN with transfer learning, wavelet transform, and MAC-MHA for multi-condition diagnosis

references.title: An adaptive fused domain-cycling variational generative adversarial network for machine fault diagnosis under data scarcity
references.key_contribution: Proposes AFDVGAN to synthesize highly realistic data under data scarcity

references.title: Fault diagnosis methods for imbalanced samples of hydraulic pumps based on DA-DCGAN
references.key_contribution: Dual Attention-Deep Convolutional GAN for hydraulic pump fault diagnosis

references.title: Enhancing multimodal fault diagnosis in mechanical systems via mixture of experts
references.key_contribution: Employs WGAN-GP with Mixture of Experts architecture for multimodal diagnosis

references.title: A fault diagnosis data augmentation method integrating multimodal non-Gaussian denoising diffusion generative adversarial network
references.key_contribution: Integrates diffusion model with GAN for multimodal non-Gaussian fault data

references.title: DiffViT-IBFD: A rolling bearing fault diagnosis approach based on diffusion model and vision transformer under data imbalance conditions
references.key_contribution: Combines diffusion model with Vision Transformer for imbalanced bearing diagnosis

references.title: Diffusion-assisted framework for fault diagnosis of rotating machinery under highly imbalanced data conditions
references.key_contribution: Non-autoregressive network (Idfwave) for denoising in diffusion model

references.title: Diffusion model-assisted cross-domain fault diagnosis for rotating machinery under limited data
references.key_contribution: Novel diffusion model-assisted cross-domain diagnosis method for data scarcity

references.title: A novel lightweight DDPM-based data augmentation method for rotating machinery fault diagnosis with small sample
references.key_contribution: Lightweight Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model for small-sample diagnosis

references.title: Intelligent fault diagnosis method based on data generation and long-patch vision transformer under small samples
references.key_contribution: Combines diffusion modeling with improved Vision Transformer and long-patch mechanism

references.title: BearGen: LLM-guided signal generation framework for bearing fault diagnosis
references.key_contribution: LLM generates signal descriptions to guide diffusion model for bearing fault diagnosis

references.title: Virtual sample diffusion generation method guided by large language model-generated knowledge for enhancing information completeness and zero-shot fault diagnosis in building thermal systems
references.key_contribution: Knowledge-guided virtual sample generation for zero-shot diagnosis in building systems

references.title: Large language models for explainable fault diagnosis of machines
references.key_contribution: LLaMA models achieve robust zero-shot adaptability across operating conditions

references.title: Fd-Llm: Large Language Model for Fault Diagnosis of Machines
references.key_contribution: Llama3-8B demonstrates robust zero-shot adaptability and cross-dataset generalization

references.title: SYN-DIAG: An LLM-based Synergistic Framework for Generalizable Few-shot Fault Diagnosis on the Edge
references.key_contribution: Cloud-edge synergistic framework with visual-semantic synergy and knowledge distillation

references.title: Adjust to reality: LLM-driven test-time semantic adjustment for zero-shot fault diagnosis
references.key_contribution: LLM-driven test-time semantic adjustment to overcome domain shift problem

references.title: KG-SR-LLM: Knowledge-Guided Semantic Representation and Large Language Model Framework for Cross-Domain Bearing Fault Diagnosis
references.key_contribution: Knowledge graph-guided semantic representation with LLM for cross-domain diagnosis

references.title: Multimodal data-enabled large model for machine fault diagnosis towards intelligent operation and maintenance
references.key_contribution: Encodes fault-related semantic relationships in triplet format for interpretable diagnosis

references.title: Large language models for prognostic analysis in mechanical fault diagnosis
references.key_contribution: Combines deep semantic understanding of LLMs with failure mechanisms for prognostics

references.title: A novel temporal classification prototype network for few-shot bearing fault detection
references.key_contribution: Temporal classification prototype network for few-shot bearing fault detection

references.title: Few-shot cross-domain fault diagnosis via adversarial meta-learning
references.key_contribution: Adversarial meta-learning for few-shot cross-domain fault diagnosis

references.title: Zero/few-shot fault diagnosis of rotary mechanism in rotational inertial navigation system based on digital twin and transfer learning
references.key_contribution: High-fidelity digital twin with few-shot transfer learning for rotary mechanism diagnosis

references.title: A Comprehensive Review of Deep Transfer Learning for Intelligent Fault Diagnosis in Rotating Machines
references.key_contribution: Comprehensive review categorizing DTL methods into instance, feature, parameter, and adversarial-based transfer

datasets.name: CWRU (Case Western Reserve University)
datasets.description: Most widely used bearing fault diagnosis benchmark

datasets.name: XJTU-SY (Xi'an Jiaotong University)
datasets.description: Life-cycle bearing data with multiple operating conditions

datasets.name: SEU (Southeast University)
datasets.description: Variable speed conditions with multiple bearing types

datasets.name: PU (Padua University)
datasets.description: European bearing standards with different sensor configurations

evaluation_metrics.description: Balances seen (S) and unseen (U) class accuracy for GZSL
